texto: The purpose of the bayonet training, Sergeant Gerheim explains, is to awaken our killer instincts. The killer instinct will make us fearless and aggressive, like animals. If the meek ever inherit the earth the strong will take it away from them. The weak exist to be devoured by the strong. Every Marine must pack his own gear. Every Marine must be the instrument of his own salvation. It's hard, but there it is.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gustav Hasford: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “The purpose of the bayonet training, Sergeant Gerheim explains, is to awaken our killer instincts…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, usmc, violence pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e violence.
